goal: Certify as far as possible: no vertex of an srg(99,14,1,2) has exactly 18 C4 fibers. 18 good fibers + 3 exceptional. The 5 triple-orbits: 4 are BCP-forced (Part A, defect certs => UNSAT); 1 (triangle) is NOT forced and needs a full SAT solve (Part B).

frame_convention.fiber: class {pi,pj}; 4 C4 edges (share one local), 2 diagonals (share none)

triangle_K3.formula: C(7,3)=35 (three matched-pair indices, all 3 fibers among them)

orbit_enumeration.note: C(21,3)=1330 triples of fibers = 3-edge graphs on the 7 matched-pair indices, 5 iso types under S7. 4 forcing + 1 residual (triangle).

vacuity_control: C4-edge-absence defects are negative units (cannot over-fill a quota); diagonal-presence defects are positive and radius-1 checked with the 72 good units. Every Part-A cert also has defect_alone_nonconflict=true, so the refutation content is in the good-fiber units, not single-quota vacuity.

part_B_residual_orbit.orbit_formula: C(7,3)=35 (three matched-pair indices, all 3 fibers among them)

bcp_free_check.note: With only the 72 good units asserted, BCP does NOT force any of the 3 triangle-fibers to C4 (contrast: the other 4 orbits are fully forced). So the residual needs full SAT solving.

part_B_residual_orbit.critical_encoding_note: You CANNOT settle the residual by leaving the 3 fibers free and reading off a model: a free fiber can (and generically will) complete to C4, so a plain free-fiber model does not witness 'all 3 non-C4'. The residual question must be posed as: is (base + 72 good units + one NON-C4 clause per exceptional fiber) satisfiable? Each NON-C4 clause is the 6-literal disjunction below. UNSAT => residual closed => k=18 forces at this orbit (hence, with the 4 forcing orbits, k>=18 fully). SAT => k=18 genuinely fails at the triangle orbit and the model is a candidate local structure with exactly 3 bad fibers.

interpretation.SAT: k=18 fails at triangle orbit; model = 3-bad-fiber structure

residual_instance.difficulty_note: Bounded solves (60M-propagation budget and a >4-min wall attempt) did NOT resolve this instance as posed with free fibers; expect a hard, signal-grade solve. Recommend cadical with a long budget + DRAT output, then drat-trim.
